subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! Verily Haji Sadiq hath now arrived, and hath opened his lips, and smiled a smile [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله ان الحاج صدیق قد حظر الان و فتح اللسان و تبسم تبسم
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual transformation, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
